function.name: pc_ui_elements
function.description: List all interactive UI elements (buttons, inputs, links, menus, etc.) visible on screen. Returns role, name, and window_title for each element. ALWAYS pass window_title to filter results to a specific window — without it, all windows are scanned and you may hit token limits.

window_title.description: Optional but strongly recommended. Only return elements from windows whose title contains this string (case-insensitive). Example: 'YouTube' or 'Chrome' to limit results to the browser window.
